x-enumeration-literals.name: Product Launch Campaign
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Introducing a new product or service to the market.
Includes teasers, pre-launch promotions, and launch events.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Brand Awareness Campaign
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Aimed at increasing visibility and recognition of the brand.
Uses a mix of media, including online ads, social media, and PR

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Retention Campaign
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Focused on keeping existing customers engaged and loyal.
Includes loyalty programs, personalized offers, and exclusive events.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Referral Campaign
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Encouraging existing customers to refer new customers.
Often incentivized with discounts or rewards for both the referrer and the new customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reactivation Campaign
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Targeting inactive or lapsed customers to re-engage them.
Includes special offers, updates, and personalized messages.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cross-Selling and Upselling Campaign
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Encouraging customers to purchase related or higher-end products.
Uses personalized recommendations and special offers.
